input_dict.question: Carlo Emilio Gadda and Katharine Kerr both were considered what?
input_dict.target_summary: Summary1 states: "They were both novelists." Second-hop evidence: Carlo Emilio Gadda is described as an Italian writer and poet who "belongs to the tradition of the language innovators, writers that played with the somewhat stiff standard pre-war Italian language, and added elements of dialects, technical jargon and wordplay." Katharine Kerr is described as an American science fiction and fantasy novelist, best known for her Celtic-influenced Deverry series.
input_dict.candidate_summary: They were both novelists. Carlo Emilio Gadda was an Italian writer and poet. Katharine Kerr is an American science fiction and fantasy novelist.
